full_question: Based on the LEGO object shown in the reference image (x_0), which of the following images shows the LEGO object from a top-down perspective? Options: A. Image showing a top-down view B. Image showing a left-to-right view C. Image showing a right-to-left view D. Image showing a front-to-back view. Answer with only the letter of the correct option (e.g. 'A', 'B', 'C', or 'D').
